task: Fix AND-CONTACTS-WIPE-001 (P0): Android contacts wiped after update

sub_tasks.name: Diagnose Root Cause
sub_tasks.scope: Identify why contacts are wiped after update
objectives: Analyze logs and code to find the root cause
constraints: Must not affect identity and message history

sub_tasks.name: Implement Fix
sub_tasks.scope: Apply the necessary fixes to prevent contacts from being wiped
objectives: Add fallback auto-contact creation in onPeerIdentified callback
Update iOS bootstrap config to include OSX relay
constraints: Must follow coding standards and best practices

sub_tasks.name: Test Fix
sub_tasks.scope: Verify that the fixes work as expected
objectives: Run tests to ensure contacts are not wiped after update
constraints: Must achieve at least 90% test coverage

sub_tasks.name: Document Fix
sub_tasks.scope: Update documentation to reflect the fixes
objectives: Ensure documentation is accurate and up-to-date
